utterances.speaker: Joanna
utterances.text: Why ? ! Why ? ! He said he would call . Why has not he called ?

emotion_cause.span: 3_He said he would call . Why has not he called ?

utterances.speaker: Sophie
utterances.text: Maybe he is intimated by really smart , strong , successful women .

utterances.speaker: Joanna
utterances.text: Sophie , would you please climb out of my butt . Why has not he called , Rachel ? Why ?

emotion_cause.span: 5_would you please climb out of my butt . Why has not he called

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Okay , okay . Umm , well ah , maybe he , maybe he feels awkward because you are my boss .

emotion_cause.span: 5_Why has not he called , Rachel ? Why ?

utterances.speaker: Joanna
utterances.text: Awkward ? Why should he feel awkward ?
